name: Vector Solutions Safety & Training API
what_it_does: Vector Solutions Safety, Compliance, and Training REST API for eLearning, compliance training, and workforce readiness. Enables AI agents to manage compliance training course assignment and completion tracking for regulatory training automation, handle OSHA and EHS training compliance reporting for safety regulation, access public safety training (law enforcement, fire, EMS) for first responder workforce development, retrieve course catalog and certification management for professional development automation, manage training transcript and compliance history for workforce compliance tracking, handle automated training assignment based on role and certification expiration for training workflow, access competency assessment and skills verification for qualification management, retrieve learning analytics and training completion reporting for compliance dashboard, manage contractor and third-party training compliance for supply chain safety, and integrate Vector Solutions with HRIS, LMS, and EHS platforms.
use_cases: Assigning OSHA training from EHS compliance agents
Tracking certification expiration from safety compliance agents
Managing public safety training from first responder agents
Reporting training compliance from regulatory agents
not_for: Academic learning management without corporate compliance focus
Non-compliance training without regulatory requirement context
Very small organizations without structured training programs
best_when: A manufacturing, construction, healthcare, or public safety organization using Vector Solutions wants AI agents to automate compliance training assignment, certification tracking, OSHA training compliance, and workforce readiness reporting.
avoid_when: OSHA TRAINING COMPLIANCE CERTIFICATION STANDARDS: Automated OSHA training assignment must comply with OSHA-specific training requirements (29 CFR training standards); automated eLearning substitution for OSHA-required in-person or hands-on training (e.g., confined space entry, fall protection) creates OSHA compliance gap. Law enforcement training Brady/POST requirements — automated law enforcement training records management must maintain POST (Peace Officer Standards and Training) certification records and Brady compliance training records; automated training record modification or deletion creates law enforcement liability. First responder continuing education — automated CE credit assignment for EMT/Paramedic license renewal must comply with state EMS licensing board requirements; automated CE assignment without state board compliance creates license renewal failure.

auth.notes: Vector Solutions uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Tampa, Florida HQ. Founded 1999 (formerly TargetSolutions). Private (Leeds Equity Partners). 24,000+ public safety and industrial customers. Safety, compliance, and training for industrial, public safety, and education sectors. Competes with Convergence Training, SafetyCulture, and Intelex for safety training.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user or per-department subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user pricing by industry sector
pricing.notes: Tampa, Florida. Leeds Equity-backed. Founded 1999. 24,000+ customers. Safety and training for industrial and public safety. Competes with Convergence Training and SafetyCulture.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; training completion reporting has bulk endpoints

known_agent_gotchas: OSHA HANDS-ON TRAINING REQUIREMENTS: Automated eLearning completion cannot substitute for OSHA-required in-person or practical hands-on training (confined space, fall protection, lockout/tagout); automated training assignment must identify and flag courses requiring in-person completion

POST and law enforcement certification records — automated law enforcement training record management must maintain POST-compliant certification records; Brady (Giglio) disclosure training records must be preserved and accessible for discovery; automated deletion of training records creates law enforcement liability

State EMS CE compliance variation — EMT and Paramedic continuing education requirements vary by state licensing board; automated CE credit assignment must comply with state-specific hour and topic requirements; generic CE automation creates license renewal failure risk
FERPA for educational institutions — Vector Solutions serves K-12 and higher education; automated student training records require FERPA compliance for sharing and disclosure

Training prerequisite enforcement — automated training assignment must enforce prerequisite completion before advanced training; automated assignment of advanced safety training without prerequisites creates safety risk

Certification expiration date accuracy — automated certification expiration monitoring must account for state-specific renewal windows and grace periods; automated license lapse notifications must be accurate to prevent unnecessary panic or missed renewals
agent_readiness.security_notes: Safety training. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Employee training and certification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Safety training. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Employee training and certification data.
